name: aming-claw
description: Codex plugin packaging for Aming Claw governance with one onboard-first skill entrypoint and the onboard_route_guide MCP tool.

interface.longDescription: Provides Aming Claw governance with a single onboard-first skill entrypoint plus MCP resources and configuration. Agents start from MCP onboard_route_guide, using the HTTP endpoint only as fallback, then select role, work type, runtime contract, worker, QA, or system operation paths from live guidance.
defaultPrompt: Start from the active aming-claw-onboard skill and MCP onboard_route_guide tool (the onboard route guide) before changing governed code; use the HTTP endpoint only as fallback.
If governance is offline, ask the user to run aming-claw start; do not use archived skills as active instructions.
Call runtime_status, graph_status, graph_operations_queue, and backlog checks before implementation.
